features: Armor All Triple Canister Pack contains Armor All Stain Remover Multi-Purpose Wipes, Armor All Protectant Matte Wipes 30ct and Armor All Glass Wipes 30ct
Cleans & Restores: These car cleaning wipes help to remove grime, tough road dirt, insects and stains to protect car surfaces and keep your car interior looking its best for long-lasting results
Multi-Surface Use: Three-in-one car cleaning solution with wipes for dashboard, windows and soft trims to provide quick and easy car care
Plastic-Free Wipes: Quick clean wipes made with biodegradable plant material
Trusted Car Care: Get innovative, easy-to-use cleaning and protecting solutions from Armor All
description: Armor All Multi-Purpose Wipes have been specially developed with stain remover to tackle everything from the occasional spillage to tough ground-in dirt on carpet and upholstery, without drying out, damaging or fading. Armor All Matt Finish Protectant Wipes are a quick and easy dashboard cleaner, providing dashboard protection in just one step. These dashboard wipes help keep surfaces looking like new by protecting against harmful UV rays. Armor All Glass Wipes are specially designed for car windscreens, removing road dirt, grime and insects quickly and easily giving a streak-free finish for maximum visibility. Armor All Protectant Wipes in the Triple Canister Pack are available in soft packaging to take on the go or in a tub format to store in your car boot or home garage. Armor All Everyday Proof Your Car.
